regions.text: Vitamin C is very important to the body. Without it men’s teeth become loose and their arms and legs weak. Lemons, oranges and tomatoes have Vitamin C in them.
Vitamin D is the sun vitamin. We get it in milk and eggs and from sunlight on our skin. There are other vitamins, but these, A, B, C and D, are the most important.
without: not having. become: come to be. loose: not strongly rooted. weak: opposite of strong. lemon: yellow fruit. tomato: red or yellow fruit.
